items.prompt: Why did Tomás leave the lab so early today?
items.answer: Tomás left early because his advisor scheduled an unexpected meeting.

items.prompt: What did Anika ask about the orchestra rehearsal schedule?
items.answer: Anika wondered when the conductor would announce the spring concert dates.

items.prompt: Have you spoken with Marcus about the team roster?
items.answer: Honestly, the coach has not finalized the starting lineup yet.

items.prompt: Where did Saoirse store her chemistry samples overnight?
items.answer: The samples were placed inside the refrigerator near the door.

items.prompt: Did Jasper notice the change to the syllabus this week?
items.answer: Jasper has not opened the updated syllabus document yet.

items.prompt: Tell me about the documentary Esme watched last weekend.
items.answer: The documentary Esme watched explored the history of urban beekeeping.

items.prompt: What did Kenji want to know about the rooftop garden?
items.answer: Kenji asked whether the rooftop garden was open to all residents.

items.prompt: Where do the freshman orientation sessions take place this week?
items.answer: Most sessions are held in the auditorium near Foster Hall.

items.prompt: Tell me what Mariana noticed after returning from her exchange program.
items.answer: Mariana noticed that the campus had changed considerably during her absence.

items.prompt: Did the new coffee shop near the library open yet?
items.answer: The new coffee shop opens earlier than the previous café did.

items.prompt: Why did Soren decline the invitation to Friday's reception?
items.answer: Soren could not attend because he had a midterm the next morning.

items.prompt: Tell me what Akilah heard at the careers fair on Tuesday.
items.answer: The recruiter explained how internship applications would be reviewed this summer.

items.prompt: Have the bookstore clerks restocked the chemistry textbooks?
items.answer: They have no idea when the new shipment will arrive.

items.prompt: What did Ramona discover about the senior thesis archives?
items.answer: Ramona realized that several theses had been misfiled by previous staff.

items.prompt: When does the language exchange club meet this semester?
items.answer: The conversation club meets every other thursday in the lounge.

items.prompt: Did Halima receive feedback on her thesis proposal?
items.answer: She has not heard back from her committee chair yet.

items.prompt: Tell me what Niklas mentioned about the campus shuttle.
items.answer: The shuttle Niklas described took an unfamiliar route around campus.

items.prompt: Why did Adelina miss the research seminar yesterday?
items.answer: Adelina explained why she had missed the seminar last week.

items.prompt: What did Wenjun ask about the dining hall hours?
items.answer: Wenjun was curious whether the dining hall served breakfast on sundays.

items.prompt: Where did Gabriela leave her badge after the lab session?
items.answer: Gabriela left the badge on the counter beside the centrifuge.
